layoutRegions.name: scope-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: At-a-glance counts for certification scopes, reviewer coverage gaps, exclusions, and sampling windows.

layoutRegions.name: scope-map
layoutRegions.purpose: Keyboard-focusable rows for certification scopes with population, resource, owner, and reviewer coverage.

layoutRegions.name: scope-corrections
layoutRegions.purpose: Panels for population filters, excluded accounts, reviewer coverage, sampling windows, and safe correction steps.

components.name: ScopeRow
components.purpose: Focusable certification scope row with population logic, ownership, and reviewer coverage context.
interactions: hover and focus-visible states expose row selection
scope state is shown with semantic danger, warning, info, or success

components.name: FilterCard
components.purpose: Population filter and exclusion card that keeps counts and concerns visible.
interactions: tone label stays visible without overlapping text
card sizing remains stable across responsive breakpoints

components.name: RollbackList
components.purpose: Ordered scope correction checklist for rollback-safe certification edits.
interactions: primary correction action has visible hover and focus-visible states
guardrail numbers are stable and token-colored

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
